'''âs-m-dh''' ('''kasamadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lushen|lushen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lushen|lushen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-m-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kasamadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisamadh|thisamadh]] || [[word:jisamadh|jisamadh]] || [[word:shisamadh|shisamadh]] || [[word:kisamadh|kisamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusamadh|thuthusamadh]] || [[word:jujusamadh|jujusamadh]] || [[word:shushusamadh|shushusamadh]] || [[word:kukusamadh|kukusamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusamadh|thusamadh]] || [[word:jusamadh|jusamadh]] || [[word:shusamadh|shusamadh]] || [[word:kusamadh|kusamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusamadh|thusamadh]] || [[word:jusamadh|jusamadh]] || [[word:shusamadh|shusamadh]] || [[word:kusamadh|kusamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesamadh|thesamadh]] || [[word:jesamadh|jesamadh]] || [[word:shesamadh|shesamadh]] || [[word:kesamadh|kesamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosamadh|thothosamadh]] || [[word:jojosamadh|jojosamadh]] || [[word:shoshosamadh|shoshosamadh]] || [[word:kokosamadh|kokosamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosamadh|thosamadh]] || [[word:josamadh|josamadh]] || [[word:shosamadh|shosamadh]] || [[word:kosamadh|kosamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosamadh|thosamadh]] || [[word:josamadh|josamadh]] || [[word:shosamadh|shosamadh]] || [[word:kosamadh|kosamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsamadh|thĂŠsamadh]] || [[word:jĂŠsamadh|jĂŠsamadh]] || [[word:shĂŠsamadh|shĂŠsamadh]] || [[word:kĂŠsamadh|kĂŠsamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasamadh|thathasamadh]] || [[word:jajasamadh|jajasamadh]] || [[word:shashasamadh|shashasamadh]] || [[word:kakasamadh|kakasamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasamadh|thasamadh]] || [[word:jasamadh|jasamadh]] || [[word:shasamadh|shasamadh]] || [[word:kasamadh|kasamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasamadh|thasamadh]] || [[word:jasamadh|jasamadh]] || [[word:shasamadh|shasamadh]] || [[word:kasamadh|kasamadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasamadh|shasamadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasamadh|goshasamadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasamadh|gokishasamadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasamadhnĂŒ|shasamadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasamadhnknĂŒ|goshasamadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamadhnĂŒ|gokishasamadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasamadhshĂ«|shasamadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkshĂ«|goshasamadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasamadhshĂ«|gokishasamadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamadhro|shasamadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkro|goshasamadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamadhro|gokishasamadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamadhmu|shasamadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkmu|goshasamadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamadhmu|gokishasamadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasamadhsher|shasamadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasamadhnksher|goshasamadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasamadhsher|gokishasamadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasamadhng|shasamadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkng|goshasamadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasamadhng|gokishasamadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasamadhya|shasamadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkya|goshasamadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasamadhya|gokishasamadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasamadhyam|shasamadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkyam|goshasamadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasamadhyam|gokishasamadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamadhnĂŒshĂ«|shasamadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasamadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasamadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamadhnĂŒro|shasamadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamadhnknĂŒro|goshasamadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamadhnĂŒro|gokishasamadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamadhnĂŒmu|shasamadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamadhnknĂŒmu|goshasamadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamadhnĂŒmu|gokishasamadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shasamadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasamadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasamadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamadhshĂ«ro|shasamadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkshĂ«ro|goshasamadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamadhshĂ«ro|gokishasamadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamadhshĂ«mu|shasamadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkshĂ«mu|goshasamadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamadhshĂ«mu|gokishasamadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamadhronĂŒ|shasamadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkronĂŒ|goshasamadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamadhronĂŒ|gokishasamadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamadhroshĂ«|shasamadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkroshĂ«|goshasamadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamadhroshĂ«|gokishasamadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamadhromu|shasamadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkromu|goshasamadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamadhromu|gokishasamadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamadhmunĂŒ|shasamadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkmunĂŒ|goshasamadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamadhmunĂŒ|gokishasamadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamadhmushĂ«|shasamadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkmushĂ«|goshasamadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamadhmushĂ«|gokishasamadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamadhmuro|shasamadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamadhnkmuro|goshasamadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamadhmuro|gokishasamadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
